title: List Bridges
content:
# List Bridges

Returns a list of Bridges (also known as Connections) and its parameters. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`GET /bridges/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.deprecated_bridge.listBridges()
print(response)

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search and filter on the list based on the keys `name`, `title` (Display Name), `cluster_name`, `node_name` and `workload_name`. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `cluster_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters. If set, it will override acp_name

parameters.name: workload_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `workload_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: status_state
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `state` in the `status` object. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: Unique identifier `name` of the App. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
